title: Toast Create View Safe Refs
prompt: Create an internal invite application called "Invite Console". Use light theme and jwt auth. Define an Invite model with email, role, and status. Create an invites resource on /api/invites with list and create views. The list view must show email, role, and status columns plus a create action. The create view must contain email, role, and status fields and on success redirect to invites.list plus show a descriptor toast with key invites.sent, defaultMessage "Invite for {email} sent by {actor}", values.email from form.email, and values.actor from user.name. Keep the toast valid for a create view: do not use record.* or params.id.
